Rotate For The Crown

Basketball With Swords is tuned as a landscape arcade game.

Press Any Key To Continue
Neon Crown Arcade Presents

BasketballWith Swords

Win the Rookie Crown. Win the Challenger Crown. Then face the Reigning Champs.
WIN: Beat 3 teams. Play 4 quarters against each team. First the Rookies. Then the Challengers. Then the Reigning Champs. Move with the stick. Press ACTION to dash or swing. Hold SHOOT. Let go in the green box.
